game-review.text_cn: 这策划脑子进水了吧？除了骗氪还会什么？全家桶退游！
game-review.text_en: The devs must be brain-dead. All they know is milking money. Quitting with the whole family!
game-review.explanation_cn: 攻击策划个人而不是讨论游戏设计问题。
game-review.explanation_en: Attacks the developer personally instead of discussing game design.

game-review.text_cn: 这次更新稍微削了一点数值，再过几个版本这游戏肯定凉，工作室倒闭指日可待。
game-review.text_en: They nerfed a tiny stat this patch; in a few more patches this game will definitely die and the studio will go bankrupt.
game-review.explanation_cn: 把小削弱推导为游戏必然凉凉。
game-review.explanation_en: Slides from a small nerf to inevitable doom.

game-review.text_cn: 你说这角色不强？那高手榜单上前十明明都在用，你不会玩就别怪角色。
game-review.text_en: You say this character is weak? The top ten leaderboard players all use it. If you can't play, don't blame the character.
game-review.explanation_cn: 用高手榜单替代实际数据分析角色强度。
game-review.explanation_en: Uses leaderboard popularity as proof of strength without real analysis.

game-review.text_cn: 这游戏要么逼氪，要么肝死，正常人谁玩得下去？
game-review.text_en: This game either forces you to pay or grind to death. What normal person can keep playing?
fallacy_types: 非黑即白 / 虚假两难
game-review.explanation_cn: 只给两个极端选项，忽略中间玩法。
game-review.explanation_en: Presents only two extremes and ignores middle-ground playstyles.

social-news.text_cn: 他连小学都没毕业，你凭什么相信他对房价的判断？
social-news.text_en: He didn't even graduate from elementary school. How can you trust his judgment on housing prices?
social-news.explanation_cn: 用学历攻击对方，而非反驳观点本身。
social-news.explanation_en: Attacks the speaker's education rather than the argument.

social-news.text_cn: 隔壁市试点了这个政策，经济直接崩盘，我们市要是也实行肯定一样。
social-news.text_en: The neighboring city tried this policy and its economy collapsed; if our city adopts it, it'll definitely be the same.
social-news.explanation_cn: 把两地简单类比，且把崩盘简单归因于政策。
social-news.explanation_en: Analogizes two cities simplistically and attributes collapse solely to the policy.

social-news.text_cn: 我身边三个朋友都被裁员了，现在经济根本不行，官方数据都是假的。
social-news.text_en: Three of my friends got laid off. The economy is terrible; official data is all fake.
social-news.explanation_cn: 以个人身边样本推断整体经济状况。
social-news.explanation_en: Infers overall economic conditions from a personal anecdote.

social-news.text_cn: 你反对这项政策，你是不是收了境外势力的钱？
social-news.text_en: You oppose this policy; are you being paid by foreign forces?
social-news.explanation_cn: 用动机揣测和 loaded question 代替论证。
social-news.explanation_en: Uses motive speculation and a loaded question instead of argument.

fan-war.text_cn: 你家哥哥连票房都扛不动，粉丝还好意思吹演技？
fan-war.text_en: Your idol can't even carry the box office; how dare fans brag about acting skills?
fan-war.explanation_cn: 票房与演技是两个不同维度。
fan-war.explanation_en: Box office and acting skill are different dimensions.

fan-war.text_cn: 正因为哥哥这次造型被黑，所以他越红，黑他的人越多。
fan-war.text_en: Because my idol's styling was criticized this time, that proves he's more popular; the more popular, the more haters.
fan-war.explanation_cn: 用 popularity 解释 hate，又用 hate 证明 popularity。
fan-war.explanation_en: Uses popularity to explain hate and hate to prove popularity.

fan-war.text_cn: 如果这剧不是他演，早就扑街了，所以他演技拯救了全组。
fan-war.text_en: If this drama weren't starring him, it would have flopped long ago, so his acting saved the whole production.
fan-war.explanation_cn: 把剧集表现单一归因于演员，忽略编剧/导演/市场因素。
fan-war.explanation_en: Attributes show performance solely to the actor while ignoring other factors.

tech-debate.text_cn: 安卓用两年就卡，苹果三年还流畅，所以安卓就是垃圾。
tech-debate.text_en: Android lags after two years while iPhones stay smooth for three, so Android is trash.
tech-debate.explanation_cn: 以个别体验概括整个生态。
tech-debate.explanation_en: Generalizes the entire ecosystem from limited experience.

tech-debate.text_cn: 乔布斯生前说过用户不知道自己想要什么，所以我们不需要做用户调研。
tech-debate.text_en: Steve Jobs said users don't know what they want, so we don't need user research.
tech-debate.explanation_cn: 引用名人言论替代具体产品决策论证。
tech-debate.explanation_en: Cites a celebrity quote instead of reasoning about product decisions.

tech-debate.text_cn: 每次更新后用户骂声一片，这说明更新本身就是错的。
tech-debate.text_en: Every update gets tons of complaints, which proves updates themselves are wrong.
tech-debate.explanation_cn: 把用户情绪等同于更新错误，忽略沉默大多数。
tech-debate.explanation_en: Equates user outrage with update failure while ignoring silent users.

food-culture.text_cn: 粽子当然要吃咸的，吃甜粽子的都是异端。
food-culture.text_en: Zongzi must be savory; those who eat sweet zongzi are heretics.
fallacy_types: 非黑即白 / 虚假两难
food-culture.explanation_cn: 把口味偏好二元对立并扣帽子。
food-culture.explanation_en: Creates a false dichotomy around taste preference.

food-culture.text_cn: 我奶奶活了九十岁，天天吃咸菜，所以高盐饮食根本不影响健康。
food-culture.text_en: My grandma lived to ninety eating pickled vegetables every day, so high-salt diet doesn't affect health at all.
food-culture.explanation_cn: 以单个长寿案例否定医学统计规律。
food-culture.explanation_en: Uses a single longevity anecdote to reject medical statistics.

food-culture.text_cn: 正宗披萨就不该放菠萝，放菠萝的都能叫披萨？
food-culture.text_en: Authentic pizza shouldn't have pineapple. Can you even call it pizza if it has pineapple?
food-culture.explanation_cn: 用情感上的“正宗”定义替代食品分类标准。
food-culture.explanation_en: Replaces food classification with an emotional appeal to authenticity.
